title: ollama/ollama
summary: Get up and running with Llama 3.3, Mistral, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, list, copy, delete models via simple API.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same verbs as Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain adapter for Ollama; drop-in LLM, chat, embeddings, tool-calling components.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Full-featured, self-hosted ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama; themes, RAG, multi-user, admin panel.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; chat, stream, pull, list, copy, delete, embeddings.

title: ollama-rails
summary: Ruby gem wrapping Ollama REST API; idiomatic Rails helpers for chat, completions, embeddings.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive TUI (text-user-interface) for Ollama; fuzzy-find models, chat history, markdown preview.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension bringing local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot chat pane.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU & PVC support.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.x integration; use Ollama models as generators, chatters, or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes: function-calling, RAG, vision, fine-tuning, CI/CD, edge deployment examples.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Docker-compose stacks bundling Ollama, Open WebUI, Weaviate, Postgres, QDrant, etc. for quick RAG setups.

title: ollama-nestjs
summary: NestJS module & service wrappers around Ollama REST API; decorators for chat, embeddings, model ops.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Async Rust crate for Ollama; strong typing, streaming, pull/list/delete, embeddings.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir OTP client for Ollama; GenServer-based connection pooling, LiveView chat examples.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET library for Ollama; chat, vision, tool-calling, streaming, embeddings with strongly-typed models.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger (CI/CD) module to run Ollama containers in pipelines; GPU & caching support.

title: ollama-rag-redis
summary: Redis & Ollama RAG template; ingest PDFs, vectorize with Ollama embeddings, semantic search via Redis Stack.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin for local AI assistance using Ollama models; inline prompts, vault Q&A.
